description:
cloudstack_static_nat

Enables static NAT for a given IP address

argument_reference.name: ip_address_id
argument_reference.description: The public IP address ID for which static NAT will be enabled. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: virtual_machine_id
argument_reference.description: The virtual machine ID to enable the static NAT feature for. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: vm_guest_ip
argument_reference.description: The virtual machine IP address to forward the static NAT traffic to (useful when the virtual machine has secondary NICs or IP addresses). Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: project
argument_reference.description: The name or ID of the project to deploy this instance to. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

attributes_reference.name: vm_guest_ip
attributes_reference.description: The IP address of the virtual machine that is used to forward the static NAT traffic to.
